reviews.review_title: Fun game to improve relfexes and brain!
reviews.review_description: This game flows nice and is simple but gets your brain active, improves reflexes as well!

reviews.review_title: Very simplistic yet super fun game
reviews.review_description: I like how simple the idea is and it feels super engaging in VR, specifically for short sessions where I want a bit of a challenge but nothing too demanding or complex for training my reflexes. Just a small tweak - I couldn’t find a pause button while playing so I felt there was a lack of continuity according to the pace I wanted. Core gameplay feels smooth overall.
